creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: kevlo
Date: Fri Nov 15 05:36:52 2013
New Revision: 333816
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333816

Log:
  Add missing file.
  
  PR:	ports/183937
  Submitted by:	Guillaume Bibaut <yom at iaelu dot net>

Modified:
  head/www/owncloud/Makefile
  head/www/owncloud/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/owncloud/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/owncloud/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 04:01:03 2013	(r333815)
+++ head/www/owncloud/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 05:36:52 2013	(r333816)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	owncloud
 PORTVERSION=	5.0.13
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.owncloud.org/community/
 

Modified: head/www/owncloud/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/owncloud/pkg-plist	Fri Nov 15 04:01:03 2013	(r333815)
+++ head/www/owncloud/pkg-plist	Fri Nov 15 05:36:52 2013	(r333816)
@@ -5215,6 +5215,7 @@
 %%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/mount.php
 %%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/storage/common.php
 %%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/storage/commontest.php
+%%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/storage/home.php
 %%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/storage/local.php
 %%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/storage/mappedlocal.php
 %%WWWDIR%%/lib/files/storage/storage.php
